scripts.dev: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter @packman/ui build && concurrently "pnpm --filter shared dev" "pnpm --filter @packman/ui dev" "pnpm --filter api dev" "pnpm --filter web dev" "pnpm --filter admin dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter @packman/ui build && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter admin build
